name: chart-pie-separator-none
visual_summary: A chart-pie-separator-none component is a UI element used to display a pie chart with no separator, ideal for showing a single data point or a simple comparison between two categories. Developers use this component when they want to display data in a clear and concise manner, while maintaining a visually appealing design. This component is a compact way to present data without overwhelming the user.
